base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of super_mario_bros_title_logo — a ui (menu_screen) from 1985 super mario bros. Static SUPER MARIO BROS. title logo — red brick-look letterforms with gold outline + drop-shadow. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static SUPER MARIO BROS. title logo — red brick-look letterforms with gold outline + drop-shadow; composed from tile-set on title screen only; displayed above menu options
